notes:
## v0.4.5 - AI Chat Image Handling & UI Enhancements
- Fixed issue where AI Chat couldn't acknowledge attached images.
- Added hidden system context for image recognition (non-OCR models).
- Improved Chat UI with amber-to-burnt-orange gradients (WCAG AA compliant).
- Enhanced dark mode contrast and added inline markdown parsing for code blocks.
- Fixed version synchronization and automated deployment scripts.
